ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "current_token" TEXT /* Current authentication token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio or description of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* The user's birthdate */,
  "location" TEXT /* The user's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's personal website or blog */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user's profile is private */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "following_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow relationship was established */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the follow request is private (for private profiles) */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow request was approved (for private profiles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "following_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stats" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were last updated */,
  "posts_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts the user has made */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the user has made */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the user has received */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A calculated score based on user engagement (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of the post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility setting of the post (e.g., public, private, followers-only) */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the post is pinned to the user's profile */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A calculated score based on post engagement (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the comment has been deleted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., follow, like, comment) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the notification has been archived */,
  "source_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the notification (e.g., the user who liked a post) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the like is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the like has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting for the user (e.g., public, private) */,
  "notification_setting" TEXT /* Notification setting for the user (e.g., email, push) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user receives email notifications */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user receives push notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, post, comment) */,
  "activity_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the activity (e.g., post ID, comment content) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when performing the activity */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search was performed */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* JSON data of the search results */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search query in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
